final:
I’d delete `VaultLibrary` in `emptyos/sdk/vault_library.py`.

It’s a convenience abstraction that wraps the already-central vault index/query layer, but it also reintroduces app-specific collection semantics, fallback scanning, field coercion, sorting, and detail/search/stats APIs on top of the platform’s lower-level vault primitives. In a blank slate, I’d keep one consistent vault API (`vault_query`, `vault_get_properties`, `vault_update`, etc.) and let apps compose their own collection logic when needed. `VaultLibrary` sits in the awkward middle: useful, but another bespoke mini-framework to maintain, and it duplicates patterns the platform already owns.
